chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2033 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 3. For hearing of MA No.7707 / 2017. 24-01-2018 Mr. Wali Muhammad Khoso advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh. Mr. Ashok Kumar advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar advocate for respondents No.10,12 and 13. Learned counsel for petitioner under instructions of the petitioner does not press this petition, which is disposed of as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
